subcodes.first_line: O ye dear friends of Abdu'l-Baha! At all times do I await your good news, longing as I do to hear that ye are making progress from day to day
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء همواره منتظر ورود اخبار مسره شما هستم که روز بروز
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
